text:
素晴らしい食材ね！
料理人がこぞって求めるだけの
ことはあるわ。

またひとつ新しいレシピと
新たなブームの予感がするわ。

これを定番メニューにできるかどうか
あとは私の腕次第ね。

あなたが頑張ってくれたことを
無駄にしないよう、私も頑

This looks amazing! No wonder every chef
I know speaks so highly of this stuff.

I feel like I've got the perfect recipe for
this that'll throw everyone into a Falcabone
frenzy.

Now, whether or not I can make this a regular
menu item, well, we'll just have to wait and
see.

But since you've gone through all the trouble
to get this to me, I'll do what I can to make
sure that effort doesn't go to waste!
